goal: Summarize a paper that just came out, then build and implement it.

nodes.output: goal accepted → search for a recent, small, implementable LLM-decoding paper
nodes.prompt: Summarize a paper that just came out, then build and implement it.
WebSearch: '2026 new LLM sampling decoding method paper logits simple algorithm'
WebSearch: 'truncation sampling min-p top-n sigma successor paper'

nodes.output: information-theoretic; dynamic threshold from the whole distribution
exact algorithm: L[P]=ΣP(v)² (=exp(-H₂)); keep P(v)≥L[P]; renormalize; sample
p-less: threshold = collision likelihood L[P]=ΣP(v)² (Rényi-2 entropy); keep tokens with P(v)≥L[P]; renormalize; sample. Hyperparameter-free; argmax always kept (maxP≥ΣP²) so the set is non-empty.
demos/coding-agent/generated/p_less.py — softmax, collision_likelihood, p_less_filter, p_less_sample (pure stdlib, CPU)
tests/unit/test_p_less.py — 9 cases (uniform-keeps-all, peaked-keeps-top, argmax-survives, flatter-keeps-more, determinism, …)
